name: design-action
description: Turn scattered design evidence — from meetings, videos, task trackers, chat, and docs — into grounded design artifacts. Provider-agnostic: works with Granola/Otter/Fireflies, Jira/Linear/GitHub, Slack/Discord, Figma/Penpot, or plain markdown.
author: Lola Salehu (https://www.linkedin.com/in/lola-salehu/)

skills.name: design-action
skills.description: Transform scattered design evidence into grounded artifacts. Aggregates context from meetings, video recordings, task trackers, chat threads, and documents — then synthesizes into prototypes, journey maps, wireframes, research docs, or FigJam boards with full source citations. Use when the user mentions design synthesis, meeting notes, design tasks, cross-source analysis, evidence gathering, or wants to turn discussions and research into deliverables. Also use for proactive source scanning (--scan), weekly priority synthesis (--priorities), or working triaged items (--execute).

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Interactive setup wizard — auto-detects MCP servers and creates config

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Proactive scan for new design-relevant items across all configured sources

commands.name: briefing
commands.description: Generate a daily design briefing from meetings, tasks, and communications
